englishDefinitions: A family entertainment restaurant and arcade chain in the United States, known for games, pizza, and children's parties.
persianTranslation: رستوران/سالن بازی خانوادگی چاک ای چیز
examples: We took the kids to Chuck E. Cheese for her birthday.
Chuck E. Cheese is famous for its arcade games and pizza.
The party will be at Chuck E. Cheese this Saturday.
